basic_details.job_title: Cabinet Secretariat Senior Field Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 35 years of age (relaxable for various categories as per Central Govt. Orders)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per Central Govt. Orders for SC/ST, OBC, Persons with Disability, Ex-Serviceman, and Central Govt. Employees.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Master's Degree in Science from a recognised University or Institution in the specified subjects, along with a valid GATE Score.
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Master's Degree in Science from a recognised University or Institution in Computer Science / Information Technology. Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Master's Degree in Science from a recognised University or Institution in Electronics and/or Communication / Telecommunication. Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Master's Degree in Science from a recognised University or Institution in Data Science / Artificial Intelligence or Computer Science with specialisation in Data Science / Artificial Intelligence. Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Master's Degree in Science from a recognised University or Institution in Mathematics. Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Master's Degree in Science from a recognised University or Institution in Civil Engineering.

salary_details.details: Senior Field Officer (Technical): Level-10 in Pay Matrix, Group 'A', Gazetted. Including all allowances will be Rs. 1,30,000/- (approx.).

selection_process: Valid GATE Score (50% or above in 2024
2025 or 2026) Interview Character & Antecedent verification Medical examination
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.employmentnews.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Senior Field Officer (Technical) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Senior Field Officer (Technical) post is 12th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Engineering or a Master's Degree in Science from a recognized university in specified subjects, along with a valid GATE Score.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Field Officer (Technical) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies announced for the Senior Field Officer (Technical) position in the Cabinet Secretariat.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Field Officer (Technical) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of approximately Rs. 1,30,000/- per month, which corresponds to Level-10 in the Pay Matrix, Group 'A', Gazetted.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Senior Field Officer (Technical) position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to fill out the application form and send it along with all required documents to the specified postal address.

faq.question: Q7. Is a GATE score mandatory for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid GATE Score (50% or above in 2024, 2025 or 2026) is a mandatory requirement for applying to the Senior Field Officer (Technical) post.

faq.question: Q8. What are the different specializations for the Senior Field Officer (Technical) post?
faq.answer: The specializations include Computer Science/Information Technology, Electronics and/or Communication/Telecommunication, Data Science/Artificial Intelligence, Mathematics, and Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a valid GATE Score, followed by an Interview, Character & Antecedent verification, and a Medical examination.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Cabinet Secretariat's official website or through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
